title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat with local LLMs from Python scripts or notebooks.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Integrate local LLMs into Node or browser apps.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama models. Use Llama 2, Mistral, etc. within LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI). ChatGPT-style interface for local models.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama. Embed local LLMs in JVM applications.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client for Ollama. Async-first bindings for Rust applications.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Ollama Docker image. Run Llama 2, Mistral, etc. in containers with GPU support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration for Ollama. Use local LLMs in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style plugin for VS Code powered by Ollama local models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG implementation using Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight Next.js chatbot UI for Ollama. Mobile-friendly and easy to deploy.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module for Ollama. Inject local LLM services into Node.js backends.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Terminal UI chat client for Ollama written in Go. Vim-style keybindings.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama. Supports .NET 6+ and async streaming.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that replies using Ollama local models. Slash-command support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes and generate text with Ollama models.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot that streams Ollama responses in threads. Built with Bolt framework.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama. GenServer-based with OTP supervision trees.
